user.title: Connect to BusMinder
user.description: Enter the URL of your school or operator's live tracking page.

manual.title: Enter BusMinder link
manual.description: That page couldn't be read automatically (it may be bot-protected). Open it in your browser, find the BusMinder live-map link(s), and paste them below — one per line. Each link points to maps.busminder.com.au/route/live and ends with an id. A bare id, or the iframe embed code, also works.

pick_routes.title: Select routes to monitor
pick_routes.description: Choose the bus routes you want to track.

pick_stop.title: Select your stop
pick_stop.description: Choose the stop for **{route_name}** where you want arrival estimates.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the tracking page. Check the URL and try again.
error.no_busminder: No BusMinder tracking widget found on that page.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.
error.parse_error: Could not read data from the BusMinder page. Check the logs for details.
error.no_uuids: No BusMinder link or id found in what you pasted. Paste a maps.busminder.com.au/route/live/… link, a bare id, or the iframe embed code.

abort.already_configured: This route group is already configured.

connection_failed.title: BusMinder connection lost
connection_failed.description: BusMinder has been unable to connect to the `{route_group}` route group for several attempts. Check that the BusMinder service is reachable. The issue will resolve automatically when the connection is restored.
